zh.lifeSummary: 當Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens於1407年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾拉加武藍時，他的父親John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg56歲，母親Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim37歲。他於1425年與Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯萊結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1431年登記服兵役。他去世於1476年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特易斯萊享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens于1407年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾拉加武藍时，他的父亲John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg56岁，母亲Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim37岁。他于1425年与Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯萊结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1431年登记服兵役。他去世于1476年在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特易斯萊享年69岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Donald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Domhnall . The final -d of the Anglicized form derives partly from misinterpretation by English speakers of the Gaelic pronunciation, and partly from association with Germanic-origin names such as Ronald . This name is strongly associated with clan Macdonald, the clan of the medieval Lords of the Isles, but is now also widely used by families with no Scottish connections.

nameMeanings.name: Balloch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bulloch
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Balloch, a locality in Bonhill, Dumbartonshire, named with Gaelic beallach ‘pass’. The change of vowel is probably due to confusion with Bullock .

variants.name: Bullick
meanings: 1  Scottish: probably a variant of   Bulloch  ,   Balloch   or   Bullock  .
2  English: locative name from Bulwick (Northants) or Bolwick Hall in Aylsham (Norfolk).

variants.name: Ballock
meanings: 2 English: nickname from Middle English ballok ‘testicle’ (Old English bealluc).
3 Scottish: locative name sometimes perhaps from Gaelic bealach ‘mountain pass’ or from one of the minor places in Scotland called Ballach, from this word.

en.lifeSummary: When Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens was born in 1407, in Lagavulin, Argyll, Scotland, his father, John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg, was 56 and his mother, Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim, was 37. He married Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick in 1425, in Islay, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1431. He died in 1476, in Islay, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens est né en 1407, à Lagavulin, Argyll, Écosse, son père, John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick en 1425, à Islay, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1431. Il est décédé en 1476, à Islay, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens 1407 in Lagavulin, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg 56 und seine Mutter Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim 37. Er hat 1425 in Islay, Argyll, Scotland Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1431 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1476 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Islay, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens è nato il nel 1407 nel Lagavulin, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick nel 1425, nel Islay, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1431. Morì nel 1476, nel Islay, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glensが1407年にスコットランドアルグイルラガvウリンで生まれた時，父John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyvegは56歳，母Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrimは37歳であった。1425年にスコットランドアルグイルイスレイでJohanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1431年に兵役登録をした。彼は1476年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトイスレイで69歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens(이)가 1407년 스컷랜드 아그이 라가브린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1425년 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬레이에서 Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1431년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1476년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 이슬레이에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens nasceu em 1407, em Lagavulin, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick em 1425, em Islay, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1431. Ele faleceu em 1476, em Islay, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens родился в 1407 г. в местности лагавулинь, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick в 1425 г. в местности ислеи, аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1431 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1476 г. в местности ислеи, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens nació en 1407, en Lagavulin, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, John Mor 'the Tanister' MacDonald of Dunnyveg, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Margaret Bisset, heiress of the Glens of Antrim, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick en 1425, en Islay, Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1431. Murió en 1476, en Islay, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
